title: lahaya gnaphalioides
intro: Lahaya gnaphalioides is a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae, commonly known as the Gnaphalium or cudweed, native to the Philippines. Lahaya gnaphalioides has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects, which are attributed to its high content of flavonoids and terpenoids. The health benefits of Lahaya gnaphalioides include reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing, as well as providing antioxidant and antifungal properties. Lahaya gnaphalioides is often prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in traditional folk medicine for various purposes, including treating respiratory issues and skin conditions.
